attributes.description: Recent USN $J file changes in non-system paths — i.e., what actually happened on this host that wasn't Windows / Microsoft / WinSxS / system AppData churn. This is the noise-reduced timeline that lets you walk the user's day without scrolling past 100,000 driver-update rows. Sort by @timestamp desc and use file.update_reasons to see what kind of change each row represents (file_create, data_extend, file_delete, rename_*, etc.). For the full unfiltered $J operations log, see Panel 5.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"tags : filesystem_j and not file.path : (*\\\\Windows\\\\* or *\\\\WinSxS\\\\* or *\\\\Microsoft\\\\* or *\\\\AppData\\\\Local\\\\Microsoft\\\\* or *\\\\Program*Files\\\\Windows*) and file.update_reasons : (file_create or data_extend or data_overwrite or file_delete or rename_old_name or rename_new_name)"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Filesystem: Recent Changes in Non-System Paths (noise-reduced timeline)
